description:
You are a property management coordinator processing overnight security footage. Three 3-minute camera recordings (camera_lobby.mp4, camera_parking.mp4, camera_loading.mp4) are located in /home/ga/Videos/security_feeds/. Using the incident data provided in /home/ga/Documents/guard_notes.txt, create a daily digest package in /home/ga/Videos/daily_digest/. 

The digest must include 6x speed time-lapses for each camera (timelapse_lobby.mp4, timelapse_parking.mp4, timelapse_loading.mp4) in H.264 MP4 format with no audio. Extract PNG frames from each camera every 30 seconds (at 0s, 30s, 60s, 90s, 120s, 150s) to /home/ga/Videos/daily_digest/frames/ using the naming convention {camera}_{seconds}s.png. Extract the four incidents described in the guard notes to /home/ga/Videos/daily_digest/incidents/ as incident_1.mp4 through incident_4.mp4, matching the specified timestamp ranges. Generate a JSON manifest at /home/ga/Videos/daily_digest/digest_manifest.json containing the keys 'cameras' (camera names and resolutions), 'timelapses' (filenames), 'incidents' (objects with clip filename, camera, start, end, and description), and 'frames_count' (total count of extracted frames).
